emails.subject: Re: Catalytica confirm
emails.body: Re: Catalytica confirm Thanks. When you have Annex A ready, we'll have to tweak Annex B. For example, I think we eliminated the term "Derivative Transactions" in Annex A (but it shows up in the Catalytica Annex B). Bart Clark is the lawyer who is asking to receive the two annexes. Enron Capital Trade Resources Corp. From: Tana Jones 09/01/99 03:49 PM
